description_long: This object is a raw steak cut, featuring a prominent strip of creamy white fat running along one edge and a deep red, marbled muscle section making up the majority of its body. The steak is elongated and relatively flat, with a slight taper at one end and a thicker, more rounded section at the other. The muscle fibers are visible, giving the surface a slightly fibrous texture, while the fat appears smooth and slightly glossy. There are no visible grill marks, garnishes, or signs of cooking, indicating it is uncooked. The coloration transitions from a rich red in the meat to a pale, almost translucent white in the fat. The overall appearance suggests a fresh, high-quality cut suitable for grilling or pan-searing.
description: A raw, elongated steak with a thick strip of white fat along one edge and deep red marbled muscle, showing a fresh and uncooked appearance.
description_view_0: The steak is seen from the side, highlighting the broad red muscle and the thick white fat cap along the top edge.
description_view_1: A narrow end-on view, showing the steak's thin profile and the layered appearance of fat and muscle.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the red muscle and white fat strip clearly visible but from the reverse angle.
description_view_3: Another end-on view, mirroring view 1, emphasizing the steak's slimness and the separation between fat and muscle.
attribute_grill_marks: No grill marks are visible on the steak; the surface is smooth and unmarked.
attribute_visible_fat_marbling: Light fat marbling is visible, mostly concentrated along one edge with minimal streaks through the muscle.
